fragments: To give form to the imaginal elements that persist in the deep substratum of temporal becoming.
Symbolic forms in perpetual transmutation, dreams or nightmares of obscure yet vital meaning.
Creation becomes letting it flow and recording it, deciding nothing beyond what the image itself demands.
home.excerpt: I am for an art born of blood and fire, arising as a visceral necessity, not as a cold and falsely philosophical operation.
home.worksLead: A selection, from paintings to drawings to digital works.
